task: Finish setting up the starting position of a chessboard that is almost arranged
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A chessboard is on a blue surface with several chess pieces scattered around it. The pieces are small, cylindrical, and have distinct colors (white, black, red). The board has a grid pattern with alternating light and dark squares. STRATEGY - Identify misplaced pieces, grasp them, transport to the correct starting positions on the board, and release. Failure modes include dropping pieces, misplacing them, or not grasping them. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for a misplaced piece. Step 2: Grasp the piece. Step 3: Transport to the correct board position. Step 4: Place the piece on the board. Repeat for all misplaced pieces.**
Goal: all_on(chess_pieces, chessboard); stable(chess_pieces)
Scene: chessboard, white_piece, black_piece, red_piece, blue_surface
Step 1: reach(white_piece)
  affordance_region: the body of the white piece
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, white_piece, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, white_piece) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(white_piece)
  affordance_region: the body of the white piece
  contact: holding(white_piece) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(white_piece)
Step 3: transport(white_piece -> chessboard)
  affordance_region: a white square on the chessboard
  spatial: above(white_piece, chessboard, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(white_piece)
  done_when: above(white_piece, chessboard, 0.05)
Step 4: place(white_piece -> chessboard)
  affordance_region: a white square on the chessboard
  contact: surface_contact(white_piece, chessboard) [completion]; released(white_piece) [completion]
  pose: stable(white_piece) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(white_piece, chessboard) AND released(white_piece)
Step 5: reach(black_piece)
  affordance_region: the body of the black piece
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, black_piece, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, black_piece) < 0.03
Step 6: grasp(black_piece)
  affordance_region: the body of the black piece
  contact: holding(black_piece) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(black_piece)
Step 7: transport(black_piece -> chessboard)
  affordance_region: a black square on the chessboard
  spatial: above(black_piece, chessboard, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(black_piece)
  done_when: above(black_piece, chessboard, 0.05)
Step 8: place(black_piece -> chessboard)
  affordance_region: a black square on the chessboard
  contact: surface_contact(black_piece, chessboard) [completion]; released(black_piece) [completion]
  pose: stable(black_piece) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(black_piece, chessboard) AND released(black_piece)
Step 9: reach(red_piece)
  affordance_region: the body of the red piece
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, red_piece, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, red_piece) < 0.03
Step 10: grasp(red_piece)
  affordance_region: the body of the red piece
  contact: holding(red_piece) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(red_piece)
Step 11: transport(red_piece -> chessboard)
  affordance_region: a red square on the chessboard
  spatial: above(red_piece, chessboard, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(red_piece)
  done_when: above(red_piece, chessboard, 0.05)
Step 12: place(red_piece -> chessboard)
  affordance_region: a red square on the chessboard
  contact: surface_contact(red_piece, chessboard) [completion]; released
